title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 128.469 - Geographical map of official congressional district boundaries to be published
text:
128.469.  Geographical map of official congressional district boundaries to be published. — Upon passage and enactment of sections 128.461 to 128.468 and as provided to the revisor of statutes, the revisor of statutes shall publish the graphical map representation of the official congressional district boundaries as an appendix of the Revised Statutes of Missouri.
(L. 2022 H.B. 2909) 
Effective 5-18-22
See Appendix I for map provided to Revisor on 9-12-22.
